variables.name: C53E1A
variables.description: Age14: Smoked cigarettes, chewed tobacco, or used snuff?

variables.name: C53E1B
variables.description: Age14: Used an electronic vapor product such as blu, NJOY, or Starbuzz? (Electronic vapor products include e-cigarettes, e-cigars, e-pipes, vape pipes, vaping pens, e-hookahs, and hookah pens).

variables.name: C53E1C
variables.description: Age14: Drunk beer, even just a few sips, when it was not at the dinner table with your family?

variables.name: C53E1D
variables.description: Age14: Drunk wine or wine coolers (such as Mikes Hard Lemonade, Smirnoff Ice, or Barcadi Silver), even just a few sips, when it was not at the dinner table with your family or part of a religious practice?

variables.name: C53E1E
variables.description: Age14: Drunk hard liquor, such as whiskey, vodka, rum, gin, or scotch, even just a few sips?

variables.name: C53E1F
variables.description: Age14: Used marijuana ("pot" or "weed")?

variables.name: C53E1G
variables.description: Age14: Used synthetic marijuana (also called K2, Spice, fake weed, King Kong, Yucatan Fire, Skunk, or Moon Rocks)?

variables.name: C53E1H
variables.description: Age14: Used prescription drugs, such as Ritalin or Oxycontin, without a parent or doctors order or other than how the doctor or your parent told you to take it?

variables.name: C53E1I
variables.description: Age14: Used steroid pills or shots ("stackers" or "juice") without a doctors prescription?

variables.name: C53E1J
variables.description: Age14: Sniffed glue, or breathed the contents of spray cans, or inhaled any paints, sprays, or gasoline to get high?

variables.name: C53E1K
variables.description: Age14: Used any other hard drugs, such as cocaine ("coke" or "blow"), crystal meth, or heroin ("smack" or "tar")?
